title: melicope macrocarpa
intro: Melicope macrocarpa, also known as the yellow wood, is a plant species native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and may help to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Melicope macrocarpa is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
